two.name: Force Absorption
two.desc: Final blows with any Rocket or Grenade Launcher temporarily decrease incoming area-of-effect damage.
two.num: After a Micromissile, Rocket Launcher, or Grenade Launcher Kill: 20% AOE Damage Resist and 60% self-explosive Damage Resist for 15 Seconds

four.name: Reactive Shock
four.desc: When Force Absorption is active, taking melee damage causes you to emit a disorienting burst once.
four.num: This disorienting burst can only be triggered ONCE per Reactive Shock activation

two.name: Force Converter
two.desc: After a final blow with any Rocket or Grenade Launcher, sprint for a short time to gain Speed Booster.
two.num: After a Micromissile, Rocket Launcher, or Grenade Launcher Kill: Grants force converter, granting speed boost

four.name: Reactive Booster
four.desc: Once per activation of Force Converter, sprinting while at critical health, being suspended, or being slowed by a Stasis effect will immediately grant Speed Booster for a short duration.
four.num: This benefit can only trigger ONCE per Force Converter Activation

two.name: Regenerative Threshold
two.desc: Performing a finisher stores power. The next time your shields are broken, consume stored power to immediately heal and start health regeneration.
two.num: Grants Regenerative Threshold on Finisher. When reaching Critical Health, consumes Regenerative Threshold and grants 20 HP and begins Health Regeneration.

four.name: Melee Conduction
four.desc: While you have Radiant, Restoration, or Cure, your melee hits release a burst that will scorch the target.
four.num: While Radiant, Resoration, or Cure are active: The tiggered Solar Blast deals 28 Damage and inflicts 30 (+10 ashes) scorch within 7 meters

two.name: Radiolaria Breach
two.desc: After picking up an Orb of Power, the next time your shields are broken, gain a bonus to Health stat for a short duration and release a burst of radiolaria around you.
two.num: Damage is very minimal. Play for the 4 piece bonus

four.name: Collective Power
four.desc: While you have a subclass buff, dealing sustained damage creates an Orb of Power.
four.num: Orb Appears at feet. Great for damage self-sustain via orbs

two.name: Iaido
two.desc: Final blows with freshly drawn or reloaded weapons heal you.
two.num: Kills Restore 35 HP. There is a 3 second Cooldown between perk activation.

four.name: Unfaltering Focus
four.desc: Bow, Shotgun, or Sword final blows temporarily reduce incoming damage. Damaging targets with those weapons extends the effect.
four.num: Resist x1 (10%) for 7 seconds. Additional damage extends buff by +2 seconds with maximum of 9 seconds.

two.name: Revving Up
two.desc: Fast movement builds up a charge that gradually increases your health regeneration speed. Once you are Fully Revved, sprinting grants Speed Booster.
two.num: Stacks accumulate at 1 per 5 seconds (45 seconds total) up to 10x stacks (+45% HP/s). Each stack grants increased Critical Health Regeneration Speed, NOT Shields. When slow, stacks deplete at 4x stacks/second

four.name: Dielectric Drift
four.desc: Sliding while Speed Booster is active jolts combatants in front of you.
four.num: No internal cooldown?

two.name: Between Poles
two.desc: Final blows with Light weapons grants stacks of Light Polarity, which grants Grenade stat. Final blows with Darkness or Kinetic weapons grants stacks of Dark Polarity, which grants stacks of Melee stat.

four.name: So Very Thin
four.desc: Final blows with Light weapons grants additional grenade energy. Final blows with Dark or Kinetic weapons grants additional melee energy. Rapid final blows that alternate between Light and Darkness grant a short period of damage resistance.
four.num: In addition to the stats provided by 2-piece, chunk-ability gains AND 40% DR for 5 seconds as long as you play the rotating elements mini-game is amazing

two.name: Accretion
two.desc: Picking up an ammo brick gives you a stacking bonus to weapon swap and stow speeds until you die.
two.num: Stacks up to 20x. Persist through death. Special grants 1 stack, Heavy 3 stacks. Bonus to ready/stow speeds at maximum is .8x Ready/Stow Animation duration at 20 stacks.

four.name: Doppler Effect
four.desc: Suspend, unravel, and sever effects applied to targets, and radiant and restoration effects applied to you have increased duration.
four.num: Duration increase is 50% longer with Ember of Solace or Thread of Continuity boosting benefit to 70%

two.name: Cursed Fist
two.desc: Melee final blows trigger a Cursed Thrall explosion.
two.num: Radius of explosion is 4.5 meters. No? internal cooldown. Explosion is ARC damage.

four.name: Power of the Son
four.desc: Being in combat for a duration grants progressively more flinch resistance and damage resistance versus combatants.
four.num: Similar to Frenzy requirements for combat (Deal/recieve damage every 7 seconds). After 12 Seconds, gain 15% Damage Resist + Flinch Resist. After 24 Seconds, gain 25% Damage Resist + Flinch Resist.

two.name: Primary Survivor
two.desc: When an ally is defeated, Primary ammo weapons gain increased handling, reload speed, target acquisition, and reduced flinch. Bonus increases when multiple allies are dead at the same time or when you are running solo.

four.name: Primary Phantom
four.desc: Final blows with Primary ammo weapons remove you from radar for a short time. Drawing a weapon that does not use Primary ammo will immediately end this effect.

two.name: Resupply
two.desc: After being out of combat for a moderate duration, your next final blow grants additional ammo progress and creates an Orb of Power.
two.num: Triggers EVERY 12 seconds no matter what; seems like a bug but likely will not get patched. free ammo progress + orbs is very good and benefits increase the less you are in combat.

four.name: From the Storm
four.desc: After being out of combat for a moderate duration, slowly gain Frost Armor until you reenter combat.
four.num: Does not have the same functionality of "being out of combat" as the 2-piece. Extremely extremley niche, borderline PVP

two.name: Adrenal Rush
two.desc: Sprinting for a short time grants a period of improved reload speed and handling. Final blows extend this period.
two.num: Triggers after 5 seconds

four.name: Bountiful Munitions
four.desc: While Adrenal Rush is active, final blows grant Special Ammo progress. Final Blows against powerful combatants, Guardians, and Taken grants additional progress.

two.name: Taking Initiative
two.desc: Hitting combatants with melee attacks or Sword strikes grants a stack of Initiative, giving bonus handling and reload. Stacks decay slowly over time.
two.num: Initiative stacks up to 5x  and lasts for 8 seconds per stack, decaying 1 at a time

four.name: Healing Initiative
four.desc: While you have Initiative, using your class ability creates a stationary healing aura. The aura gains increased healing based on the number of Initiative stacks.
four.num: Upon Class ability usage, deploys stationary Healling Drone that heals every 2 seconds. Health restored is +10 HP (+50 HP Max) per initiative stack and can pulse up to 5 times per Class Ability use

two.name: Built Bitter
two.desc: Taking damage increases the reload speed of your equipped weapon until it is stowed. Taking more damage increases the effect.
two.num: Stacks to 10x. Self Damage does not count. ~+50 reload speed and ~.85x -.9x Reload Duration Multiplier at MAX stacks

four.name: Bittersweet
four.desc: When you stow a weapon, restore health based on the number of Built Bitter stacks lost.
four.num: ~+35 HP at 1 stack (Full Heal at >8x stacks) Healing seems to be inconsistent and can provided substantially more health sometimes.

two.name: Pleas Heard
two.desc: Reloading an Auto Rifle, Scout Rifle, or Sidearm after a final blow slowly restores health until you reenter combat.
two.num: Healing is 20 HP/s after reloading within 3 seconds of a kill. Lasts until any "combat" action is taken (ability use, weapon, class, super, take damage).

four.name: Magnificent Duty
four.desc: When you reach critical health or heal an ally at critical health, Auto Rifles, Scout Rifles, and Sidearms gain a period of increased range, stability, and reload speed.
four.num: Grants +20 Range, +20 Stability, +30 Reload Speed, and .9x Reload Duration Multiplier to listed weapons for 11 seconds.

two.name: Nightmarish Power
two.desc: Final blows to a challenging combatant or higher-ranked target grant Unstable Essence. When you have Unstable Essence, you receive grenade and melee stat bonuses.
two.num: Buff triggers on elite+, lasts for 15 seconds, and grants +30 to melee and grenade stat.

four.name: Nightmarish Resilience
four.desc: When you have Unstable Essence, rapid weapon damage or final blows heal you and begin health regeneration.
four.num: While buff is active, 8 damage instances  within 3 seconds each (only counted once per .45 seconds) Begins Critical Health Regeneration and restores 20 HP. 2 second internal cooldown.

two.name: Gift of the Ley Lines
two.desc: Rapidly defeating combatants with Void energy spawns a Void breach.
two.num: Requirement is 3 Void kills within 5 seconds of each other.

four.name: Techeun's Foresight
four.desc: After collecting a Void breach, your next final blow with a Void weapon triggers a detonation. The detonation is more powerful if it is triggered quickly after collecting a Void breach.
four.num: Techeun's Foresight granted on collecting void breach: next void weapon  kill triggers a 3 meter Void detonation for 87 Damage. If Void breach collection is rapid, grants Techeun's Clairvoyance: next void weapon kill triggers a 5 meter Void detonation for 173 damage

two.name: Emergency Electromagnet
two.desc: When your shields become broken, collect all nearby Orbs of Power and ammo bricks.
two.num: Radius is 10 meters. Picking up multiple orbs will grant multiple stacks of 4-piece Repurposed charge buff.

four.name: Repurposed Charge
four.desc: Whenever you gain, lose, or spend an Armor Charge, heal and gain damage reduction for a short time. This effect scales with the amount of Armor Charge gained, lost, or spent.
four.num: Grants +5 HP per Armor charge change, with duration = 3 seconds * stacks. The change scales based off SIMULTANEOUS gains/loses. Maxes out at x7 stacks. x2 = 13% DR, x3 =21% DR, x4 = 29.5% DR, x7 = 35% DR

two.name: Rapid Repair
two.desc: When your shields begin to regenerate, you gain flinch resistance and damage resistance for a short time.
two.num: Grants 10% Damage Resist and ? flinch resist for 7 seconds

four.name: Built from Scratch
four.desc: While your reserves are low, combatant final blows with weapons provide additional ammo progress based on their ammo type. Primary ammo weapons boost Special ammo progress, and Special ammo weapons boost Heavy ammo progress.
four.num: Primary's grant +3% special progess and Special's grant +2% Heavy ammo progress on Low Ammo Reserves.

two.name: Stack 'Em Up
two.desc: Defeating targets with unique elemental damage grants a stacking bonus to Transcendence energy gains while Transcendence is inactive.
two.num: Buff duration is 24 seconds, refreshed on unique elemental kill. CANNOT refresh once all 5 elements have been utilized.

four.name: Burn 'Em Down
four.desc: While Transcendence is active, using your grenade ability consumes all stacks of Stack 'Em Up to grant an escalating amount of grenade energy.
four.num: Grants 6% Prismatic Grenade energy per stack of Stack 'Em up used up to 30% at maximum.

two.name: Sinew Stitching
two.desc: Taking damage from combatants sometimes spawns a Threadling.

four.name: Knit Together
four.desc: For a short time after your shields break, your next several Threadling hits restore health.

two.name: Taken Barrier
two.desc: Grenade final blows temporarily reduce incoming damage.
two.num: Grants Damage Resist x1 (10%) for 7 seconds

four.name: Taken Armaments
four.desc: Grenade final blows grant additional Heavy ammo progress.

two.name: Primary Honing
two.desc: Increases handling and reload speed for Primary ammo weapons. Primary ammo weapons gain increased damage against non-boss combatants based on your Weapons stat.
two.num: Damage bonus is around 12.5% bonus damage against non-boss combatants at 200 Weapons Stat compared to 100 Weapons Stat. Does NOT affect boss combatants.

four.name: Supercyclical
four.desc: Final blows while your Super is active refund Super energy when it ends.
four.num: Returns up to 30% super based on kills in super/with super. Works with Well of Radiance, works with bubble (melee kills holding bubble ONLY), does stack with super-generating exotics, enemy tier scales super gains to maximum 30% quicker. Around 6 red bar kills for max gains

two.name: Vigilant Watch
two.desc: As your health gets lower, your weapons gain increased stability and handling. Weapon final blows while your shields are depleted heal you.
two.num: Grants +30 HP on weapon kills when shields broke. 5 Second internal cooldown.

four.name: Iron Conviction
four.desc: When your shields become broken, you gain increased ammo generation, flinch resistance, and damage resistance against nearby combatants for a short time. Final blows extend this effect.
four.num: Grants +35 ammo Regeneration stat, 15% Damage resist against Combatants within 15 meters for 7 seconds. Additional kills refresh buff duration. Buff cant retrigger until any shield has been recovered.

two.name: Network Admin
two.desc: Being near allies creates a relay network that gives the wearer improved handling and reload speed. Being near other allied Network Admins additionally grants the wearer a bonus to Health stat.

four.name: Network Upload
four.desc: Weapon final blows grant the wearer and nearby allies melee energy.

two.name: Terminal Velocity
two.desc: Final blows with primary ammo weapons grant your primary ammo weapons temporarily increased reload speed.
two.num: Grants +20 reload speed and .95x Reload Duration Multiplier for Primary Weapons for 6 Seconds. Triggers on Constructs as well.

four.name: Power Loader
four.desc: Picking up an Orb of Power grants special ammo progress.
four.num: Grants 6% Special Ammo Progress on Orb pickup.

two.name: Augmented Servos
two.desc: Powered melees release an additional disorienting pulse when used to defeat a target.
two.num: Disorient triggers .67 seconds after combatant death in a 10 meter radius that applies Disorient for 2.5 Seconds.

four.name: God-like Judgment
four.desc: When your shields are broken by a combatant, or upon casting your Super, release a swarm of heat seeking micro-missiles.
four.num: Critical Health releases 2 680 Damage micromissiles while casting super releases 4 680 Damage micromissiles.

two.name: Ionic Overclock
two.desc: While amplified, your Fusion Rifles, Linear Fusion Rifles, and Heat weapons gain increased handling, reload, and vent speeds.

four.name: Shock and Clear
four.desc: Final blows with Jolt or against jolted combatants create Ionic Traces.

two.name: Photogalvanic
two.desc: Receiving healing temporarily grants your Solar weapons increased flinch resistance, handling, and reload speed.
two.num: Grants +20 Handling, + 10 Reload Speed, .85x Reload Duration Multipler and Flinch resist for Solar weapons upon ANY sources of healing while not at full HP

four.name: Cauterize
four.desc: Rapid Solar final blows heal you.
four.num: Grants +35 HP after 3 Solar kills within 3 seconds of each other. Small internal cooldown.

two.name: Paroli
two.desc: Primary ammo weapons gain a bonus to flinch resistance after sliding.

four.name: Martingale
four.desc: Your weapons gain a temporary increase to handling and aim-down-sights speed when an ally is defeated or you revive an ally.

two.name: Bad Dreams
two.desc: Final blows versus subclass-debuffed targets have an escalating chance to spawn an Orb of Power.
two.num: Requires 3 elementally debuffed kills to spawn an orb. No internal cooldown?

four.name: Dream-Devourer
four.desc: Performing a finisher versus a powerful combatant grants Devour. While you have Devour, gain damage resistance versus combatants.
four.num: Grants Devour for 6 (+3) Seconds, while Devour is active, gain +20% Damage Resist against Combatants.

two.name: Iron Sharpens Iron
two.desc: Final blows on Guardians and powerful combatants generate additional ammo progress.
two.num: Dont know numbers yet but its a lot.

four.name: Ascendant Escape
four.desc: After a final blow on a powerful combatant, the next time your shields are broken, you become invisible.
four.num: Duration of invisibility is ~6 seconds

two.name: Primary Chain
two.desc: Primary ammo weapon final blows grant a stacking bonus to mobility and Primary weapon range and handling until you are defeated.

four.name: Sublime Transit
four.desc: Increases mobility and grants enhanced sprint speed and slide distance.

two.name: Stable Resonance
two.desc: Defeating a powerful combatant generates Stable Resonance, which grants damage resistance and increased weapon damage for the duration.
two.num: Grants 7% increased damage and 25% Damage Resist for 12 Seconds on Orange bar+ kill

four.name: Resonance Redirection
four.desc: While you have Stable Resonance, continued weapon damage occasionally generates a resonance burst that damages and exhausts targets.
four.num: Dealing ~600 Damage triggers an 8-meter radius Exhausting Blast that deals damage and inflicts exhaustion. ~2 second internal cooldown.

two.name: Resonant Plating
two.desc: Your health begins regenerating immediately after taking melee damage from a powerful combatant.
two.num: Health Regeneration Triggers on Miniboss+ melee hits

four.name: Siphoning Touch
four.desc: Gain stacks of Siphoning Touch for weapon or Glaive melee hits. Switching weapons heals you and consumes all stacks.
four.num: Stacks up to 5x. Consumes all stacks on weapon stow and Heals +30 HP per stack consumed.

two.name: A Wish for Protection
two.desc: Taking significant damage in a short time generates a Protective Wish that makes it harder for combatants to hit you, and grants increased reload speed and flinch resistance.
two.num: Buff duration is 7 seconds and incurs a 5 second internal cooldown before it can be triggered again

four.name: A Wish Fulfilled
four.desc: When the Protective Wish expires, it cures you. Rapid final blows prematurely end the Protective Wish.
four.num: Grants Cure x1

two.name: Combat Meditation
two.desc: Sword hits return grenade and class energy. Bonus energy is granted if Blade Focus is active.
two.num: Grants 3% Grenade and Class Ability enrgy per Sword Hit. Bonus increase to 8% with Blase Focus Active.

four.name: Blade Focus
four.desc: Briefly guard with a Sword to ready Blade Focus. While Blade Focus is readied, hitting a target with your sword increases Sword damage and lunge distance for a moderate duration.
four.num: After guarding for 1.35 seconds then hitting a target, grants Blade focus: +10% bonus sword damage, +100% sword lunge range, buff duration 7 seconds or on sword guard or stow.

two.name: Rasputin's Wrath
two.desc: Final blows with area-of-effect damage, Solar abilities, Seventh Seraph weapons, or IKELOS weapons grant Warmind Charges. Each stack of Warmind Charge increases your Weapons and Grenade stats.
two.num: Stacks up to 10x with a duration of 10 seconds. All stacks disappear on expiration. Each stack grants +3 grenade stat and +3 weapon stat up to +30 maximum for each

four.name: Rasputin's Reprisal
four.desc: While you have Warmind Charges, defeating powerful combatants, destroying a construct, or destroying a Tangle releases a Solar detonation that damages combatants and heals allies. Constructs include barricades, turrets, Stasis crystals, and other objects created in the field.
four.num: On Elite+ Kill: Damage is 405 Solar Damage, restoring +50HP to user and allies over 10 meters. On Construct Kill: ~half damage and health over same radius. Warmind detonations can grant warmind stacks but not chain into other warmind detonations. .3 second internal cooldown.

two.name: Reflex Action
two.desc: Swapping to a Heat weapon, Submachine Gun, or Hand Cannon grants a short period of increased handling and accuracy. This effect is extended by dealing damage with that weapon.
two.num: Duration is 1.5 seconds. Dealing damage extends duration. Grants +50 handling, .6x Ready Duration Multiplier, and -2.5% Accuracy Cone Size for 1.5 seconds

four.name: Hotshot
four.desc: Dealing final blows while Reflex Action is active grants a bonus to weapon stat and increases stability, reload, and aim assist for Heat weapons, Submachine Guns, and Hand Cannons for a moderate duration.
four.num: Scoring a kill grants Hotshot for 10 seconds: +15 Stability, +20 Reload Speed, Bonus Aim Assist, and +30 Weapons stat

two.name: Ride Together, Die Together
two.desc: When you pick up an Orb of Power, gain a brief period of rapidly decaying damage reduction.
two.num: Buff duration is 3 seconds. Initially grants 40% DR, scales down to 30% within 1.5 seconds and is further reduces to 24% with 1 second left, decreasing to 0% at no time remaining.

four.name: Too Old for This
four.desc: Defeating a powerful combatant with a finisher grants you Special ammo progress and replenishes a small amount of health.
four.num: Grants 16% Special Ammo Progress and restores +35 HP on elite+ finisher

two.name: Augmented Armaments
two.desc: Primary ammo weapons deal increased damage to disoriented combatants.
two.num: The damage bonus is +15% against disoriented combatants, but does NOT work with Arc Blind.

four.name: Augmented Explosives
four.desc: Your grenade abilities release an additional disorienting pulse shortly after detonating.

two.name: Balestra
two.desc: Damaging a target with a Sword, Glaive, or any melee attack exhausts them. Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.
two.num: No internal cooldown

four.name: Stesso Tempo
four.desc: Blocking attacks with a Sword or Glaive grants a short period of damage resistance against targets when you next drop your guard.
four.num: Upon Blocking, grants 50% Damage Resist for 3 seconds after Guard is dropped. No internal Cooldown.

two.name: The Ceremony
two.desc: Finishing combatants or reviving allies initiates a Lucent Hive ritual. While the ritual is active, gain increased Super stat.
two.num: Duration of Ceremony is 30 Seconds. Buff can be refreshed up to a max of 30 seconds. Grants + 30 Super Stat while active.

four.name: Lucent Swarm
four.desc: Collecting Orbs of Power extends the Ceremony. While it is active, ability final blows occasionally spawn allied Arc moths.
four.num: Scoring 2 ability kills spawns a Loyal Arc moth with 8 second duration. The moth chases enemies within 60+ meters and deal 180 damage, inflcting blind for 8 seconds over ~6 meters. All means of Bolt Charge discharge trigger can spawn the moth (except praxic blade).

two.name: Queensfoil Rush
two.desc: Gain a powerful overshield while performing your finisher. When you finish a target, release a slowing burst around you.
two.num: Grants a +200 HP Overshield for the duration of the finisher. The slow radius is 7 meters

four.name: Truth to Power
four.desc: Gain increasing damage resistance when you deal damage or land final blows. Finishers grant accelerated progress. At max stacks, the recharge rate of your abilities is also increased.
four.num: Each Damage instance scored grants Truth stacks, up to x999 stacks. Kills/finishers grant more stacks. Truth grants Damage Resist: x250 = 3.75%, x500 = 7.5%, x750 = 10%, x999 = 15%. At x999, turns into power, which boosts Ability Regeneration Rate on top of the DR.

two.name: Wrecker
two.desc: You deal significantly increased Kinetic damage to combatant shields, overshields, vehicles, and constructs. Constructs include barricades, turrets, Stasis crystals, and other objects created in the field.
two.num: Passively grants +200% increased Kinetic Damage towards Combatant Shields and Overshields. 15% increased Kinetic Damage towards Constructs.

four.name: Concussive Rounds
four.desc: Defeating powerful combatants or breaking a combatant shield with Kinetic damage releases a disorienting Kinetic shockwave.
four.num: Disorienting Blast deals 162 Kinetic Damage, Heavy staggering, and inflicts disorient in a 10 meter radius.

two.name: Opening Act
two.desc: Final blows with grenades grant Heat weapons bonus stability and vent speed and grant Primary ammo weapons bonus stability and reload speed.
two.num: Duration of buff is 15 seconds.

four.name: Room Clearing
four.desc: Multiple final blows with Heat weapons or Primary ammo weapons grant bonuses to weapon and grenade stats and increased ammo generation for Heat weapons and Primary ammo weapons.
four.num: Triggers upon scoring 3 kills within 4 seconds of each and grants Room Clearing: Buff duration is 10 seconds and grants +40 Grenade and +40 Weapons Stat and +40 ammo generation for Heat/primary ammo weapons.

two.name: License to Thrill
two.desc: Activating your grenade or the Nanotech Tracer Missiles Origin Trait provides stacking resistance to incoming damage at point-blank range.
two.num: Buff can stack up to x10 and lasts for 15 seconds. Quicksilver Storm micromissiles do synergize. Damage Resist at x1 stack is 12% against enemies within 5 meters. This scales up to 30% Damage Resist at max stacks.

four.name: Lethal Weave
four.desc: Defeating an unraveled combatant grants grenade ability energy. If you have max grenade energy, you are granted Special ammo meter progress instead.

two.name: Old Martian Diplomacy
two.desc: Stowing a weapon after defeating a powerful combatant or a Guardian heals you a small amount and disorients nearby combatants.

four.name: High Noon
four.desc: Freshly drawn weapons deal increased precision damage to combatants for a short period. Weapons with the Tex Balanced Stock Origin Trait equipped or Exotics manufactured by the Tex Mechanica Foundry gain further increased benefits.
four.num: Grants +7% increased Precision Damage against Combatants for 3 Seconds. Bonus Doubles to +15% for Tex weapons Origin trait weapons and exotics, including DMT, Huckleberry, Lasy Word, Tarrabah, Chaperone, and Prospector.

two.name: Scoot to Loot
two.desc: Sliding collects nearby ammo and temporarily grants enhanced reload speed and handling to your weapons.

four.name: Shoot to Scoot
four.desc: Dealing damage with your weapons temporarily grants enhanced sliding. Sliding provides damage resistance.

two.name: Crook and Flail
two.desc: Picking up an ammo brick heals you.
two.num: Grants +70 HP on Ammo Brich Pickup

four.name: Gift of Sight
four.desc: Final blows with Primary ammo weapons grant you briefly increased radar resolution.
four.num: Duration is 5 seconds and can trigger off constucts.

two.name: Lucent Transmutation
two.desc: Performing a finisher on a combatant, or landing successive powered melee final blows, generates an Elemental pickup based on your Light subclass.
two.num: Requires a finisher or 2 melee final blows (small .2 second cooldown between kills for some reason. DOES NOTHING if Strand/Stasis super is equipped.

four.name: Lucent Tithes
four.desc: Performing a finisher on powerful combatants heals you and generates loyal Void moths.
four.num: On elite+ finisher, Restores +50 HP and spawns 3 Loyal Void Moths that grant 22.5 HP Void Overshield to user and allies on impact.

two.name: Special Relativity
two.desc: Picking up ammo reloads stowed Special weapons from reserves.
two.num: Fully reloads

four.name: Superluminal Motion
four.desc: After dealing damage with your Super, health and shields regenerate over time while you are in motion. Additional Super damage refreshes this effect.
four.num: Restores +30 HP/S for 11 seconds as long as you are moving.

two.name: Fanfare
two.desc: Gain increased reload speed for the bottom half of your equipped weapon's magazine.
two.num: While ammo is <= 50% or Magazine AND Ammo isnt 0, +15 Reload Speed and .95x Reload Duration Multiplier. Does not work with Bows, GLs, or Rockets (unless magazine isnt 1).

four.name: Suros Harmony
four.desc: Reloading a weapon grants it a bonus to handling and reduces incoming flinch for a short time. Weapons with the SUROS Synergy Origin Trait are granted increased range instead.
four.num: After reload, +30 handling and some flinch resistance for 6 seconds. The Range benefit for the origin trait is +15 Range. Persists through stow only on the weapon it was initially triggered on.

two.name: Watchtower
two.desc: Precision final blows while aiming down sights grant damage resistance until you stop aiming down sights.
two.num: After a kill, Grants Resist x2 (25% Damage Resist) until no longer ADS

four.name: Field Expertise
four.desc: Precision final blows with any weapon grant a stacking bonus to reload speed, target acquisition, and weapon damage against non-boss combatants for a short duration. Weapon final blows with non-precision direct hits end this effect early.
four.num: On precision kill, grants 1 stack of Field Expertise for 15 seconds, stacking up to 5 stacks. Lose all stacks on non-precision kill. At x1 stack, grants +3.5% non-boss combatant damage up to a max of +10% non-boss combtant damage at x5 stacks.

two.name: Untold Greed
two.desc: Picking up ammo, Orbs of Power, Elemental pickups, or destroying a Strand Tangle grants stacks of Untold Greed, slightly reducing damage taken and providing reload speed to equipped weapons. When your shields are broken, some stacks are lost.
two.num: Untold Greed stacks up to x100. Reaching Critical Health removes 10 stacks.

four.name: Overflowing Coffers
four.desc: While you have stacks of Untold Greed, Orbs of Power and Elemental pickups provide more of their respective energy, and Strand Tangles deal increased damage. When your shields are broken, all stacks are converted into a fountain of Orbs of Power.
four.num: Testing needed. Your greed sickens me
